ramifications: New 'repeat-off' icon will be available for use in applications
Bundle size may increase slightly due to additional icon
No existing functionality should be affected

updates.summary: This patch release contains two targeted bug fixes related to URL rewrites and caching behavior. Both fixes address edge cases that could cause incorrect optimization or missing cache tags, making this a low-risk improvement update.
ramifications: Same-URL rewrites will no longer be incorrectly optimized when response headers need to be applied
Static props redirects will now properly receive cache tags, improving cache invalidation behavior

updates.summary: This is a low-risk minor update that adds a new feature for suggesting fixes to the no-unused-private-class-members rule and fixes two specific bugs. The changes are primarily additive with targeted bug fixes that improve ESLint's functionality without breaking existing behavior.
ramifications: New suggestions feature for no-unused-private-class-members rule may provide additional linting feedback
Bug fix for require cache handling may resolve edge cases in Node.js environments
Fix for rule suggestions in class bodies may change how certain syntax errors are reported
